meanings.definition: direct the course; determine the direction of travelling

examples: We lead him to our chief
can you take me to the main entrance?
He conducted us to the palace

meanings.definition: be a guiding or motivating force or drive
examples: The teacher steered the gifted students towards the more challenging courses
They had the lights to guide on
He ran his eyes over her body
She ran her fingers along the carved figurine
He drew her hair through his fingers

meanings.definition: showing the way by conducting or leading; imposing direction on
examples: felt his mother's directing arm around him
the directional role of science on industrial progress
